title: Ceremony
overview: Sin witnesses his parents’ sacrifice and vows to confront Unika to learn her true motive.

title: Belief in Peace
overview: Unika disrupts the peace ceremony, triggering a fierce clash as Sin tries to reach her true intentions.

title: A Soaring Angel
overview: Sin confronts Unika to prevent a new war, while Elphelt goes missing during a critical investigation.

title: King of Gears
overview: Sin confronts his failures, Unika questions herself, and the true enemy's identity begins to surface.

title: King's Decision
overview: Sin and Unika lose control as Future Nerville’s plan triggers a global Gear rampage.

title: Emissary from the Future
overview: With the world at stake, the warriors clash against a relentless power that threatens everything.

title: Dark Sun
overview: Sin leads a final charge to stop Nerville as allies unite and the fate of the world hangs in the balance.

title: What Makes You, You
overview: Unika and Sin face a pivotal battle that will shape their futures.
